variants.title: Donaldson P551849 Fuel Water Separator Spin On
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P551849 Fuel Water Separator Spin On is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Fuel Water Separator Spin On
Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β20

variants.title: Mann Filter WK 1020 x Fuel Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P551849
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER fuel filters remove unwanted and damaging dirt particles from the fuel and thus prevent possible damage. Thanks to the highest degree of separation and sealing, the fuel filter ensures functional reliability and optimum protection during the entire maintenance interval.
specifications: Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency
calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β20

variants.title: Fleetguard FS19775 Fuel Filter/Water Sep Spin-On | Replaces the Donaldson P551849
variants.description: Fleetguard® FS19775 premium fuel water separator spin-on works to remove water and other particulates and ensures clean fuel is delivered to your engine.
specifications: Style: Fuel Water Separator Spin On
